fixed_source: m=snap;i=io:std.io;i=s:std.str;f=main():$i64{let line1=io.readln();let line2=io.readln();let p1=s.split(line1;" ");let p2=s.split(line2;" ");let n=p1.len();let score1=mut.0;let score2=mut.0;let snaps=mut.0;let idx=mut.0;lp(idx<n){let c1=p1.get(idx);let c2=p2.get(idx);if(c1=c2){io.println(s.concat("Snap! at turn ";s.fromint(idx+1)));snaps=snaps+1};score1=score1+1;score2=score2+1;idx=idx+1};if(snaps=0){io.println("No snaps")};let total=score1;let out=mut."";if(snaps>0){out="Player 1 wins ";out=s.concat(out;s.fromint(total));out=s.concat(out;"-0");io.println(out)}el{io.println("Draw")};<0}
